docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ARIAS RAFAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARIAS RAFAEL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
